caption: The video features a series of graphic overlays appearing over a blurred background of people in a classroom or lecture setting. Initially, a logo and the text "Indian Institute of Technology Bombay" are displayed on a dark blue horizontal band. This evolves as a second band appears below it, featuring a different logo and the text "Center for Distance Engineering Education Programme." The scene then shifts to a new set of overlays. A lower dark blue band appears with a circular logo and the text "National Programme on Technology Enhanced Learning." Below this, the phrase "Center for Distance Engineering Education Programme" is briefly visible in a faded green font before disappearing. Throughout the sequence, the background remains a soft-focus view of individuals, including people wearing light-colored shirts and suits, who are sitting in a row.
